pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes the mandate content to this path using cat > /home/ga/Documents/QGC/caa_adsb_mandate.txt.
export_result.sh checks for the existence, modification time, and content of this specific path.
export_result.sh outputs the final results JSON to this path.
setup_task.sh generates the mandate text requiring these precise values, and verifier.py strictly enforces these target float parameters with tolerances.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task data is completely synthetic and dynamically generated. The setup script explicitly writes the regulatory mandate containing the required ADS-B and traffic avoidance parameter values (ADSB_ENABLE: 1, AVD_ENABLE: 1, AVD_W_DIST_XY: 1500, AVD_W_DIST_Z: 300, AVD_F_DIST_XY: 500, AVD_F_DIST_Z: 150, AVD_F_ACTION: 2) to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/caa_adsb_mandate.txt. The evaluation scripts (export_result.sh and verifier.py) correctly require these parameters to be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/adsb_configured.params and directly extract live values from the simulated MAVLink connection to confirm the exact matching of all 7 values.
